name: Pi Sessions
description: Adds stable Pi session IDs and StackDock-managed Pi session storage for terminal profiles that start Pi.

fields.label: Use stable session IDs
fields.description: Pass --session-id so each StackDock terminal can reopen the same Pi session without using the resume picker.

fields.label: Store sessions under StackDock
fields.description: Opt in to passing --session-dir so StackDock-managed Pi sessions live under StackDock app data instead of the default Pi sessions folder.
